name: Career Achievement Highlight
description: Features a standout career achievement or personal record for a player, such as national team call-ups, award nominations, or personal bests.

achievement.example: From Demo Brand Academy to Major Campaign glory

career_timeline.example: 2018: Academy debut | 2019: First team | 2020: Senior debut | 2021: Transfer to RB Leipzig

quote.example: Demo Brand made me the player I am today. I will always carry Main Venue in my heart.

guidelines: Carousel format: Slide 1 shows the achievement headline with player cutout. Slide 2 presents a visual timeline of key career moments. Slide 3 features a personal quote. Emphasize the Demo Brand connection to the player's development. Works well for players who graduated from the academy.
